name: Durham Public Schools
districtFact: Durham Public Schools serves families in Durham and Durham County, including communities in the Research Triangle region near Wake County, Orange County, and Chapel Hill.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Durham Families
content: Use the DPS traditional calendar for most students unless your school follows the year-round or Cooperative Innovation High Schools calendar.
Add teacher workdays, annual leave days, holidays, and early release days to family calendars before planning childcare or travel.
Check the official DPS district calendars page after weather closures because inclement-weather reserve days may change student attendance plans.
Families comparing Triangle-area school schedules should check DPS, Wake County, and Johnston County dates separately.

compareIntro: Compare the traditional calendars for DPS, Wake County Public School System, and Johnston County Public Schools. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Durham Public Schools calendar should families use?
districtFaqs.a: Most DPS students follow the traditional calendar shown on this page. Year-round schools and Cooperative Innovation High Schools publish separate calendars, so families in those programs should use the matching official calendar.

districtFaqs.q: Can Durham Public Schools calendar dates change after approval?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. Weather closures, board decisions, or instructional-time requirements can change the calendar. DPS marks some dates as inclement weather reserve days, so families should re-check the official district calendars page after closures.

districtFaqs.q: How should families read teacher workdays and annual leave days?
districtFaqs.a: Teacher workdays, required teacher workdays, annual leave days, and listed holidays are no-school dates for students when they fall inside the student calendar. MySchoolDates simplifies those labels when the main impact for families is student attendance.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute DPS calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Durham Public Schools district calendars page and school-level announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with DPS.

relatedDistricts.name: Wake County Public School System
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Neighboring Triangle-area district. Useful for families comparing Durham, Raleigh, Cary, Morrisville, and RTP-area school schedules.

relatedDistricts.name: Johnston County Public Schools
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Nearby Raleigh-area district with a different traditional calendar and separate school break pattern.

sources.label: North Carolina Department of Public Instruction
